title: Viridawn
description: An RPG modpack based around leveling your character and completing dungeons
body:
A New Dawn Breaks... Are You Ready to Answer the Call?

Step into the mystical realm of Viridawn, a sprawling RPG Minecraft modpack where nature, magic, and steel intertwine in a story-driven survival experience. The gods have fallen silent, kingdoms crumble, and strange green light pulses from forgotten ruins. As the last flicker of hope, you awaken in a shattered world on the brink of rebirth or ruin.

Features & Core Systems:
- Epic Class System
Choose your path from unique RPG classes like Warden, Spellblade, Ranger, and Druid, each with specialized skills, passive traits, and progression trees. No two heroes will walk the same road.

- Dynamic Questlines & Factions
Engage in an evolving world with multi-branching questlines and moral choices.

- Handcrafted World Generation
Explore a meticulously curated world with lush forests, ancient groves, haunted barrows, and ruined cities, enhanced by biome and structure mods for a breathtaking open-world experience.

- Magic Meets Nature
Discover and master mystical forces through mods like Botania and Malum Grow your power by forging bonds with elemental spirits and nature’s primal magic.

- Challenging Combat & Dungeons
Prepare for battle with overhauled combat mechanics, custom mobs, elite bosses, and procedurally generated dungeons filled with lore, traps, and treasure.

- Survival Reimagined
Hunger, temperature, and encumbrance mechanics make survival a challenge worth conquering. Every choice in exploration, equipment, and alignment matters.

- Immersive Visuals & Audio
With stunning shader support, custom music, and environmental soundscapes, Viridawn offers an RPG experience that is both beautiful and immersive.

The World is Waking Up...
Viridawn is more than a modpack—it's a living, breathing fantasy world. Alone or with allies, forge your legend, uncover ancient secrets, and bring balance or chaos to a land on the edge of transformation.

Your journey begins with the dawn. Will you rise with it?

THIS DESCRIPTION IS FOR A FINALIZED MODPACK
CURRENTLY WIP
